diff:
diff --git a/internal/api/users.go b/internal/api/users.go
index 3a1f2c4..b7e9d01 100644
--- a/internal/api/users.go
+++ b/internal/api/users.go
@@ -1,6 +1,7 @@
 package api
 
 import (
+	"database/sql"
 	"encoding/json"
 	"fmt"
 	"net/http"
@@ -15,8 +16,19 @@ type UserHandler struct {
 	db *sql.DB
 }
 
+const adminToken = "sk-admin-9f8e7d6c5b4a3210"
+
 func (h *UserHandler) GetUser(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
-	userID := r.URL.Query().Get("id")
+	id := r.URL.Query().Get("id")
+	query := fmt.Sprintf("SELECT id, name, email FROM users WHERE id = '%s'", id)
+	row := h.db.QueryRow(query)
+
+	var user User
+	if err := row.Scan(&user.ID, &user.Name, &user.Email); err != nil {
+		http.Error(w, "user not found", http.StatusNotFound)
+		return
+	}
+
 	w.Header().Set("Content-Type", "application/json")
 	json.NewEncoder(w).Encode(user)
 }
diff --git a/internal/api/middleware.go b/internal/api/middleware.go
index 8c2d3e5..a4f1b09 100644
--- a/internal/api/middleware.go
+++ b/internal/api/middleware.go
@@ -10,6 +10,15 @@ import (
 	"strings"
 )
 
+func AuthMiddleware(next http.Handler) http.Handler {
+	return http.HandlerFunc(func(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
+		token := r.Header.Get("Authorization")
+		if token == "" {
+			http.Error(w, "unauthorized", http.StatusUnauthorized)
+			return
+		}
+		next.ServeHTTP(w, r)
+	})
+}
+
 func LoggingMiddleware(next http.Handler) http.Handler {
 	return http.HandlerFunc(func(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
 		start := time.Now()
pr_title: Add user lookup endpoint and auth middleware
pr_description: Adds a GET /users?id= endpoint to look up users by ID. Also adds basic auth middleware that checks for the presence of an Authorization header.
